chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1296 of 2019 C. P. No. D – 392 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge C. P. No. D-1296 of 2019 Application in disposed of case For hearing of CMA No.1907/2024 (151 CPC) C. P. No. D-392 of 2020 Application in disposed of case For hearing of CMA No.1909/2024 (151 CPC) 31.05.2024 Petitioners are present in person. Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for respondents-University. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for respondents-University has submitted a statement along with a notification of petitioners’ retirement from service and removing the penalty as ordered by competent authority vide order dated 11.01.2024. Listed applications are accordingly disposed of. Office to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matter. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
